task_completion.description: Measure the maximum transverse Cardiac Diameter in Weasis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line measurement annotation is visible across the central 'cardiac' structure in the Weasis image viewer, displaying a length value in mm.

task_completion.description: Measure the maximum internal Thoracic Diameter in Weasis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second line measurement annotation is visible across the wider 'thoracic' cavity/outer structure in the Weasis image viewer, displaying a length value in mm.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot showing the measurements to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog, terminal command, or image viewer showing the screenshot being saved to or existing at ~/DICOM/exports/ctr_measurements.png.

task_completion.description: Create a text report at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation or editing of a file at ~/DICOM/exports/ctr_report.txt.

task_completion.description: The text report contains exactly the three required lines with values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report shows exactly three lines: 'Cardiac Diameter: <value> mm', 'Thoracic Diameter: <value> mm', and 'Cardiothoracic Ratio: <value>'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Weasis application to perform the measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Weasis GUI is clearly visible with its measurement tools actively used on the loaded DICOM image, rather than a generic image viewer or mock interface.

integrity.description: The values in the text report match the measurements taken in Weasis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The diameter values written in the text report exactly match the lengths shown on the measurement annotations in the Weasis screenshot.

integrity.description: The Cardiothoracic Ratio is mathematically consistent with the measured diameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ratio value in the text report is the result of dividing the Cardiac Diameter by the Thoracic Diameter (within a 0.05 tolerance), not a hardcoded or guessed value.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The text report must be saved to exactly /home/ga/DICOM/exports/ctr_report.txt and the screenshot to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/ctr_measurements.png. The calculated Cardiothoracic Ratio in the report must be the Cardiac Diameter divided by the Thoracic Diameter, with a math tolerance of 0.05. Note that the loaded image might be an X-Ray Angiography cine loop or a synthetic gradient image with a circle, despite the task mentioning an 'axial CT slice'.
